channel.display-name: Weird or What? With William Shatner
The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch
A New Life in the Sun

programme.title: Uptown Girls: Uptown Girls
programme.desc: Molly Gunn is the daughter of a late rock legend, and the toast of New York City. But when her inheritance is stolen, Molly is forced to do something she's never done before - get a job. Molly becomes a nanny to a girl, who is "eight going on forty."

programme.title: Barbershop
programme.desc: Calvin, who inherited a struggling barbershop, views the shop as nothing but a burden and waste of his time. After selling the shop to a local loan shark, Calvin slowly begins to see his father's vision and legacy .

programme.title: Timeline: Timeline
programme.desc: Based on the Michael Crichton novel. TIMELINE tells the story of a professor who inadvertently catapults himself back to 14th-century France, in the middle of the 100 Years War.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Old-school salesmen Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) try to reboot their careers by joining Google’s fiercely competitive internship program — with hilarious results!

programme.title: Get Shorty
programme.desc: Golden Globe® winner John Travolta stars with Gene Hackman, Danny DeVito and Rene Russo in this wildly popular comedy of a gangster who turns into a big-time producer after he travels to Hollywood to collect a debt from a down-and-out filmmaker.

programme.title: Species: Species
programme.desc: She's beautiful, seductive, intelligent, and her charms could spell doom for the entire human race! Ben Kingsley, Forrest Whitaker and Natasha Henstridge star in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi hit.

programme.title: Child's Play
programme.desc: When serial killer Charles Lee Ray is mortally wounded in a police shoot-out, he uses a voodoo spell to transfer his soul into Chucky, a Good Guys doll. Young Andy receives the doll as a birthday gift, and Chucky soon resumes his killing spree.

programme.title: Stigmata
programme.desc: A priest from the Vatican is sent to visit a woman who's showing signs of stigmata. The priest comes to find that the lady is truly possessed by something.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Elliot Richards is a hapless young man consumed by unrequited love, and desperate to change his life, he makes a deal with the devil who slyly promises to do just that — for a price.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Skor’s plan to put the Mayor of Megalopolis in a frilly dress by blasting him with his newly invented ‘Dressifier’ comes to a quick halt when the dinos intervene. But this defeat stings Skor’s ego more than usual.
programme.sub-title: Breaking Up Is Hard To Do

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: Johnny, Trey and Maggie race to save Soaring Heights, despite the fact they are unable to use their Metajet weapons and functions.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Playback
programme.desc: Frog and Pigeon plan an exclusive expose on Playmaker after Ghost Gal supplies them with the goods on Link VRAINS’ newest hero!

programme.title: Storm Hawks
programme.desc: The Storm Hawks are stranded in the dreaded Black Gorge, from which no airship has ever returned. Now the only one who can lead them through the unspeakable dangers to recharge their power crystal is Stork!

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: When the Metajets discover a sunken prototype of the A-R-C Carrier in an unstable chasm under the ocean, the race is on to board the vessel and retrieve an important computer disk

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Vash Naroom is in flames. Our heroes are losing their battle against Agram. In his moment of victory, Agram reveals to Tony that he couldn't have escaped the Core without the assistance of one of his closest friends. Right then, Tony wakes up.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Hyperactive Jet accidentally breaks the Dino Posse’s high-tech gem finder, just as it locates a new powerful gem, apparently embedded in some kind of household object. The team tries to come up with other high-tech methods of tracking the stone.

programme.title: Massive Monster Mayhem
programme.desc: Master Mayhem’s got a new phone! It’s got apps, lasers, and it even talks. This super smart phone might even out-smart Master Mayhem himself. Meanwhile, Dome Diddy Dome is powered by a teen girl’s phone, dialing up destruction on Planet Earth.

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: When a wanna-be rock star is accidentally transformed into a Shark -- he also becomes the overnight musical success, now known as "Rox"!

programme.title: Storm Hawks
programme.desc: The Storm Hawks promise an old Sky Knight they’ll rescue his granddaughter Dove, a prisoner in the clutches of Cyclonia. But when they sneak inside the Smelters of Terra Gale for the mission, they find Dove is anything but a damsel in distress.

programme.title: Massive Monster Mayhem
programme.desc: Major Disappointment crashes on Master Mayhem’s couch and becomes MM’s unwanted roommate. It’s almost like a TV sitcom! To get him out of the condo, Master Mayhem sends him to make a mess on Earth.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: McGee the Mermaid / Welcome to Buttcon
programme.desc: The kids accidentally resurrect an evil mermaid who floods the camp.
programme.sub-title: McGee the Mermaid / Welcome to Buttcon

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: An Invitation
programme.desc: Ghost Gal’s gained backdoor access to Sol Tech’s database and Playmaker’s ready to duel her for it!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: True Blue
programme.desc: Blue Angel hopes to give her fans something to scream about by defeating Playmaker, but after receiving a dangerous card from the Knights of Hanoi, her fans might be screaming for all the wrong reasons!

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: An A-R-C race in the heart of farm country brings Johnny home for the first time since joining the league.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Camouflaged Chaos
programme.desc: Playmaker hacks into Sol Tech’s database in search of answers, but he finds trouble instead when he runs into a pair of destructive AIs!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Ring Around The Gretchen / Chilli Con Carnage
programme.desc: Beauty pageant Gretchen looks to connect with her girly side.
programme.sub-title: Ring Around The Gretchen / Chilli Con Carnage

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Bugging Out
programme.desc: The fate of LINK VRAINS hangs in the balance as Playmaker faces off against one of Hanoi’s top lieutenants!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Gore at War
programme.desc: Making a comeback is what Gore does best, but will his finisher be enough to vanquish Varis?

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: An attempt to kidnap the Sharks goes awry when Dr. Piranoid's massive big rig truck goes out of control.

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: With his new time machine, Piranoid hopes to get rid of the Sharks. He sends Streex back to Jurassic times and Jab to Atlantis.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Edgar excitedly shows the posse his new telescope. He plans to use it to watch “Bailey’s Comet. ” It’s a brilliant comet streaking through the sky – making its closest pass to earth in nearly 60 million years.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: While the team is at a racing event in Canada, Captain Strong is meeting with the World Council aboard their massive jet-liner headquarters.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: The Lost Incident
programme.desc: The chilling details of the past are finally revealed as Playmaker continues his battle with Zaizen.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Sweat, Hot Lakebottom Summer / The S'Mogre
programme.desc: A heat wave forces McGee to sneak a dab of Sawyer's anti-sweat cream. After trying to cheer up Armand, McGee creates a s'more so big, it topples and coats him in delicious goo.
programme.sub-title: Sweat, Hot Lakebottom Summer / The S'Mogre

programme.title: Storm Hawks
programme.desc: Repton and his cronies decide to heat things up on the icy Terra Blizzaris. But even working together with the wild and crazy Absolute Zeroes, the Storm Hawks may be headed for a meltdown.

programme.title: Storm Hawks
programme.desc: The Storm Hawks are stranded in the dreaded Black Gorge, from which no airship has ever returned. Now the only one who can lead them through the unspeakable dangers to recharge their power crystal is Stork!

programme.title: Storm Hawks
programme.desc: Having lost the Aurora Stone to the cunning Dark Ace, The Storm Hawks mount a daring mission, sneaking into the very heart of the evil empire of Cyclonia to take the powerful crystal back.

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: Rox returns to Fission City to receive a special rock music award. At the urging of the Sharks, he also agrees to make public their evidence proving that Dr. Piranoid is behind the attempted genetic alteration of the population.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Ring the Bell
programme.desc: Gore grapples with Varis as he looks to drop the hammer on the Hanoi!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Diagnosis: Deletion
programme.desc: Blue Angel’s looking to Speed Duel her way to victory, but the diabolical doctor she’s battling is set on prescribing a dose of defeat!

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Aspiring Paleontologist Edgar Chudley discovers four dinosaurs – self-trained in the ancient martial art of Kung Fu – living in the basement of the museum where he works. And they are not the only dinos on the loose.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: We open on yet another instance of the Posse Combosizing and defeating Skor. Desperate to win next time, Skor creates his own gadget that will allow him to Combosize himself and Skrap. However, the device barely works.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Their previous trip to Bograth having been interrupted, the kids return to the swamp realm to search for its Dreamstone. They encounter a herder named Gorran dipping a large cage containing Bograthian Creatures into an oozing black puddle.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: The team heads for the Siberian Tundra for a race that involves using ski-attachments on the jets.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Camp Lockdownbottom / All You Need is Larva
programme.desc: Rosebud is sick of everyone borrowing her stuff, and draws the line when her precious golden ladle goes missing. After eating raw cookie dough, Squirt develops a case of worms!
programme.sub-title: Camp Lockdownbottom / All You Need is Larva

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Golfadoom / There is Something About Mamba
programme.desc: McGee, Gretchen and Buttsquat must beat Haggis MacJockstrap in golf!
programme.sub-title: Golfadoom / There is Something About Mamba

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: The A-R-C is in Hawaii for a race through a series of dormant volcanoes.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Kane’s irritation with all things modern has left him pining for the good ol’ days when everything was made of rock. And when something as simple as mashing potatoes becomes a complicated mess he finally snaps and takes off for some ‘alone time’.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Festa al Lago
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour returns to Bellagio for the WPT Festa al Lago, and Andy Frankenberger aims to win two titles in the same season.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic
programme.desc: Vanessa Rousso looks to win her first WPT title, but Antonio Esfandiari and Andrew Robl stand in her way in the WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic.
programme.sub-title: WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Southern Poker Championship - Part 1
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour is at Beau Rivage in Biloxi, Mississippi for the WPT Southern Poker Championship.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Southern Poker Championship - Part 2
programme.desc: Down to the final four in the WPT Southern Poker Championship, Allen Carter chases history in becoming the first player to win the same WPT event twice.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Invitational - Part 1
programme.desc: It's time for the WPT Invitational final table from Commerce Casino in Los Angeles, with a $100,000 top prize up for grabs.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Invitational - Part 2
programme.desc: The Season IX WPT Invitational from Commerce Casino is down to the final four, competing for the $100,000 top prize.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Bay 101 Shooting Star
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour is in San Jose, California, for the WPT Bay 101 Shooting Star, and none other than Mike Sexton goes for his first WPT title at the final table.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Hollywood Poker Open - Part 1
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour is in Indiana for the WPT Hollywood Poker Open, and Erik Seidel headlines the final table.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Hollywood Poker Open - Part 2
programme.desc: The WPT Hollywood Poker Open is down to three players, with Erik Seidel, Mike Scarborough, and William Reynolds.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown
programme.desc: More than $1.1 million is up for grabs as the first-place prize in the WPT Seminole Hard Rock Showdown, with Tommy Vedes and Allen Bari at the final table.
programme.sub-title: WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT World Championship
programme.desc: Season IX comes to an end with the prestigious WPT World Championship from Bellagio in Las Vegas.

programme.desc: Six players compete for more than $750,000 at the WPT L.A. Poker Classic final table at Commerce Casino.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole take a break from household chores and go on a family vacation.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Week 3
programme.desc: The girls meet Girls Aloud singer Nicola Roberts and take part in a photoshoot for Beat Bullying.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Week 4
programme.desc: The girls take part in a posing challenge on Carnaby Street then film a commercial for Beyonce's new fragrance 'Heat'. The photoshoot involves being covered in chocolate which proves difficult for one girl who shows up hungover.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Week 5
programme.desc: Alesha Dixon meets the models and tasks them with selling her new jewelry line on live television. After meeting Grace in Gatwick airport they are given £500 to go on a shopping spree. They are then whisked off to Spain to do a photoshoot in swim wear.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Week 6
programme.desc: The girls take part in an acting challenge on the Hollyoaks set and one girl gets carried away on a night out with some of the cast members. The girls must do a horror style photoshoot.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Week 7
programme.desc: The models face an icy photoshoot when they fly off to Norway.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Week 8
programme.desc: This week the girls do a beauty shoot for Revlon and some girls are pushed over the edge in a second shoot for 'Galaxy Ripple'.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Week 9
programme.desc: A challenge with Nicky Johnston sees one model facing harsh criticism. The girls then do a photoshoot with TV personality George Lamb and take part in a photoshoot with a London Rugby team for legendary photographer Terry O'Neill.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Week 10
programme.desc: The final 5 arrive in Kuala Lumpar and meet with fashion legend Jimmy Choo to take part in a dance challenge. The photoshoot this week takes place at night for Baby G watches.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Week 11
programme.desc: The final 4 are sent on go-sees around Kuala Lumpar and are sent to the jungle for their photoshoot.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Mama Drama

programme.title: Mob Wives: Desert Storm
programme.desc: Karen moves forward and boldly tries to reopen her father 's case. Meanwhile, Ang speaks to Drita about Love 's ongoing problems with Carla.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Winging It
programme.desc: Renee prepares for a new business venture; Karen's relationship intensifies, Love reveals her issues with Carla to Drita and Drita and Ang pass new information to Carla.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Crazy Love
programme.desc: Karen throws a pre-nup party to educate the ladies about protecting their assets; Carla reveals disturbing news; Drita hires staff for her store.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Love Hurts
programme.desc: Ramona shares her wedding plans, but Karen continues to offer unwelcome advice. Plus, Drita throws a 1980s-theme bash, where Love faces Carla, leading to a battle royale.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 41

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 109
programme.desc: Myths tested: Could MacGyver have built an ultralight airplane from bamboo, trash bags, duct tape and a cement mixer?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 10
programme.desc: Myths tested: Do frozen chickens cause more damage than thawed chickens when shot at a plane's windshield? Did a man die trying to compact his laundry in the washing machine by standing on it?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 194
programme.desc: Can a bullet ricochet off pavement and up through a car's floorboard, as seen in "Burn Notice"? Can you ride an explosion's shock wave to jump farther than you can under your own power?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 131
programme.desc: Can a sonic shock wave shatter glass? Is it possible to bend bullets around obstacles, like in the movie "Wanted?"

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 12
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a bullet cause explosive decompression and tear a plane apart? Will a bullet used as a fuse in a vehicle work, and then will it fire?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 31
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a toy car beat a Dodge Viper in a quarter-mile downhill race? Is yawning contagious? Does buttered toast always land buttered-side down?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 84
programme.desc: Myths tested: Is it possible to beat a speed-tracking camera? Can a defibrillator cause nitroglycerin patches to explode?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 155
programme.desc: Can a sneeze leave a person's nose at around 100mph? Can sneeze droplets travel up to 30 feet? Can nasal secretions contaminate a room quickly? Can you be decapitated by a tornado?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 67
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a hybrid rocket be propelled with salami? Is it more efficient to drive a truck with its tailgate up than down? Can a sword slice a machine gun barrel?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 199
programme.desc: Is the method used for boarding planes by most airlines inefficient? Can you make an untraceable bullet out of teeth?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 191
programme.desc: Can a fire extinguisher hold off a flamethrower? Can a fleet of cars kick up enough dust to blind a surveillance drone?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 85
programme.desc: Myths tested: Is there any way to prevent a bloodhound from tracking one's scent? Is it possible to get past a guard dog? Can an old dog be taught new tricks?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 157
programme.desc: Is there any way to prevent a bloodhound from tracking one's scent? Is it possible to fool a dog trained to sniff out contraband?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 124
programme.desc: Can a banana peel really cause one to slip? Does double-dipping cause germ warfare? Can you really make a homemade diamond?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 184
programme.desc: Will an explosion in a sewer launch a manhole cover as seen in many Hollywood films? Can truck bedliner withstand a car crash, a dog bite and an explosion?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 97
programme.desc: Myths tested: Are bulls really aggravated by the color red? Can ammunition stored in the oven be lethal? Do bulls in a china shop really cause complete destruction?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 102
programme.desc: Myths tested: Is it possible to use a rowboat as a submarine? Can one escape if buried in the sand? What kind of projectiles would pirates use in a cannon if they run out of cannonballs?

programme.title: Joe Somebody
programme.desc: Tim Allen is Joe, a guy whose life has been steadily changing for the worse.ÿ When the office bully goes too far, Joe decides it's time to turn himself from a nobody into a somebody.

programme.title: Be Cool
programme.desc: John Travolta is back as Chili Palmer in this sequel to "Be Cool." With an all-star cast that includes Uma Thurman and The Rock, "Be Cool" is the hilarious tale about a gangster-turned-music-mogul...and what it takes to be number one with a bullet!

programme.title: Lost In London
programme.desc: A first-of-its-kind film event which was filmed and screened live simultaneously in select cinemas around the world. The film is loosely based on Woody Harrelson's tabloid-worthy crazy London night-out resulting in him getting in trouble with the law.

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scoundrels
programme.desc: The south of France. Two rival con men -- one is suave and sophisticated, the other is a third-rate American hustler -- make a wager.

programme.title: Fatal Instinct
programme.desc: Carl Reiner directs this side-splitting spoof that stars Armand Assante, Sean Young and a host of familiar faces in a series of suspense and thriller parodies.

programme.title: Black Knight
programme.desc: When a wisecracking black hustler from South Central L.A. finds himself transported back to medieval England, he leads the overthrow of an evil king and wins the heart of a proto feminist woman.

programme.title: Hot Tub Time Machine
programme.desc: Four buddies share a wild night of drinking in a ski resort hot tub and wake up with hangovers in 1986! Now, they’ll need the help of a one-armed bellhop and a hot tub repairman to survive the crazy 80’s, but it may change their future forever!

programme.title: Airplane Mode
programme.desc: Horny American teenagers fly to Australia for sex at the social media convention in Sydney. Will Logan survive his fear of flying? Will the pilots survive passengers not using airplane mode? Will anyone survive?

programme.title: King Of California
programme.desc: Commercial airline pilot Whip Whitaker (Denzel Washington) has a problem with drugs and alcohol, though so far he's managed to complete his flights safely.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Strange Things at Owd Betts
programme.desc: Sean heads to Rochdale and investigates strange paranormal reports at Owd Betts. Something spooky lurks in the basement and it seems Sean is not alone as he investigates the main bar.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Dimensional Gateway of The Nine Ladies Stone Circle
programme.desc: Sean heads to Stanton Moor, Derbyshire and encounters a portal to the spirit dimension within a mystical stone circle, used for witchcraft and occult practices. With no outside interference, the activity is off the scale.
programme.sub-title: Dimensional Gateway of The Nine Ladies Stone Circle

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: The Mischievous Ghost of The Kings Arms Hotel
programme.desc: Sean investigates claims that a mischievous ghost going by the name of Alice is causing havoc at The Kings Arms Hotel. This is one night at a hotel that the team will not rest.
programme.sub-title: The Mischievous Ghost of The Kings Arms Hotel

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Dangerous Demon of The Stork Inn
programme.desc: Sean heads to Wigan to investigate a location with history dating back to 900AD. Encountering a spirit that attacks him, will the team be safe tonight as they come face to face with pure evil?
programme.sub-title: Dangerous Demon of The Stork Inn

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo
programme.desc: Buried under the location Sean investigates tonight, is the bones of the deceased and it appears that they are at unrest. Will Sean solve the mystery of who is haunting this location?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Not a Very Fun Day at The Beech Caves
programme.desc: Witchcraft, demons and ghosts have all been reported to haunt these caves. Sean investigates this network of tunnels deep underground and uncovers that all is not as it seems. This is not a day out at the seaside at Beech Caves.
programme.sub-title: Not a Very Fun Day at The Beech Caves

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: The Curse Of The Pendle Witches - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads deep into the Pendle Hills in search of the Pendle Witches that went to trial in 1612 and were hung for witchcraft. The investigation takes an unexpected twist with a stop at the New Inn, Pendles most haunted pub.
programme.sub-title: The Curse Of The Pendle Witches - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: The Curse Of The Pendle Witches - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of Pendle Hill and ventures even deeper into the hills. The night takes an unexpected turn with a dramatic ending, which he believes was caused by the witches.
programme.sub-title: The Curse Of The Pendle Witches - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Shadow Menace Haunting Morley Market - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to the town of Morley to investigate the infamous Morley Market. A place once bustling with people from years gone by, it is now haunted by shadow figures, and they appear to want to make themselves known.
programme.sub-title: Shadow Menace Haunting Morley Market - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Shadow Menace Haunting Morley Market - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues the investigation at Morley Market and appears to be followed by a spirit person that wants to touch him and distract him from investigating certain parts of the main hall. Will he uncover who this spirit is?
programme.sub-title: Shadow Menace Haunting Morley Market - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Horror at Sandhole Cottage - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean returns to his former, haunted home. No tenant has ever been able to stay the full term. Sean wants to seek out the spirits once and for all, to finally find out what is haunting his former home.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Horror at Sandhole Cottage - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of Sandhole Cottage and appears to be in direct contact with the spirits that haunted any tenants that came to live there. Will he finally get them to rest?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Opening The Book at Leeds Library - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean delves deep and opens a new chapter for the Ghost Dimension Flying Solo series as he investigates Leeds Library, to uncover what is haunting and frightening the staff that work here.
programme.sub-title: Opening The Book at Leeds Library - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Closing The Book at Leeds Library - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation at Leeds Library and attempts to communicate with a spirit known by the name of Sternberg. Will his investigation have a happy ending?
programme.sub-title: Closing The Book at Leeds Library - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Secret Spirits at The Old Market Tavern - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Altrincham, Greater Manchester to investigate The Old Market Tavern. Once used as a coaching inn and a court house, many spirits still lurk here and Sean captures one of the most clearest EVP's ever.
programme.sub-title: Secret Spirits at The Old Market Tavern - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Secret Spirits at The Old Market Tavern - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his paranormal investigation at The Old Market Tavern and he appears to have attracted the attention of spirit that launches a physical attack on him. Will he survive the night?
programme.sub-title: Secret Spirits at The Old Market Tavern - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo
programme.desc: Sean heads to Astley Green to the infamous Astley Green Colliery Museum. So many reports of paranormal activity have been confirmed at the mine, from lost miners to tormented souls.
programme.sub-title: Digging Deep Astley Green Colliery Museum - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Digging Deep Astley Green Colliery Museum - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation into Astley Green Colliery Museum and attempts to make further contact with the souls and spirits who have lost their lives there. Will he succeed?
programme.sub-title: Digging Deep Astley Green Colliery Museum - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Historic Hauntings of Whittington Castle - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Oswestry to investigate claims of hauntings at a castle thousands of years old, and believed to be haunted by an angry judge. Will any of the souls that departed here come out to play?
programme.sub-title: Historic Hauntings of Whittington Castle - Part 1

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventures
programme.desc: While Deacon is sick, Bill and Ted join him to watch an episode of Mr. Radish's Condo, the famous pre-school program. They are dismayed to discover that their childhood hero is leaving his show.
programme.sub-title: It's A Bogus Day In The Neighborhood

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: During Mardi Gras festivities, Matt and Scott stumble upon an old man, Jacques, being chased by Sly, Rax and Dagger.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Planes are disappearing so Matt comes to investigate to insure the safety of his new jet which is to be shown to the military.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Royal Canadian Mounted Panther': Pinky dreams of being a Mounty and gets his chance when a 'Damsel in Distress' mistakes him for one. 'Power of Pink': Through an experiment, the Panther is changed from a mild mannered plumber into Super Pink.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Dead Eye Duck
programme.desc: Duckula becomes a deputy in the Wild West.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Rent a Butler
programme.desc: Duckula sells Igor and Nanny to an agency to make some money

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: The Australian Outback is the setting for a true Battle of the Giants. The Mask Team is pitted against a Venom Team.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Danger Mouse and Penfold travel to Australia where they pick up top secret plans from an agent rat in the form of a rugby ball. Penfold gets distracted by a boomerang and is later picked up by large bird of prey.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Town Hall Terrors
programme.desc: Duckula goes to the Town Hall to get a grant for his crumbling castle.

programme.title: Count Duckula: The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: Duckula decides to become an actor and stages the story of Jack and the Magic Walnut at the castle.

programme.title: Pink Panther & Pals: The Pink The Bad And The Ugly
programme.desc: Sheriff Pink and Hoarse must rescue the town's money from Bandit Big Nose and his gang.
programme.sub-title: The Pink The Bad And The Ugly

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Danger Mouse and Penfold have a day off, but they use it to go through the Amazon jungle to look for the long-lost crown of Questzebottle, an Aztec king who is known for inventing the practical joke.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Pink Encounters': The Panther mistakes an alien spaceship for his pink caddie and inadvertently blasts into space. 'Junkyard Pink Blues': Pinky goes into business as a Tracer of Missing Pets and finds himself up against the Dogfather.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Danger Mouse investigates strange goings-on at Stonehenge only to battle his devilish alter-ego.
programme.sub-title: The Good the Bad and the Motionless

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Danger Mouse and Penfold head to the Indian Ocean to investigate several ship sinkings caused by "ghost buses". The buses turn out to be ice blocks shaped like a London bus created by Baron Greenback.
programme.sub-title: The Strange Case of the Ghost Bus

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: While in India, VENOM lures a cobra from a snake charmer.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Greenback has London at a standstill after he steals all of the world's tea.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Danger Mouse and Penfold had to the China seas to look for Professor Squakencluck who, despite having invented an object that can never be lost, ends up dropping the item in a remote island and getting lost himself.

programme.title: Pink Panther & Pals: A Fairly Pink Pumpkin
programme.desc: Farmer Big Nose dreams of winning the pumpkin contest at the fair, but can he beat Pink Panther's pumpkin?

programme.title: Pink Panther & Pals: Make Pink, Not War
programme.desc: Pink Panther is caught in a crossfire between two feuding Big Noses with water balloons.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Penfold and Danger Mouse journey to the center of the Earth to stop a loud noise that originates there.

programme.title: Count Duckula
programme.desc: Count Duckula is approached to perform as a prince in a Hollywood film.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: VENOM hypnotizes the people of a town by broadcasting a certain frequency.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: It's a great honor to be asked to represent an Indian tribe in the Mesa Verde Memorial, but Brad Turner doesn't appear excited when Calhoun Burns tells him they've been invited by Nevada Smith's tribe.

programme.title: Count Duckula
programme.desc: Duckula tries to impress the nanny fan club by winning all the winter sports.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: VENOM disguises a vehicle as a giant scorpion and kidnaps Dr. Choi, who has knowledge of the lost treasure of Kublai Khan.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'The Reluctant Ninja': To retrieve the stolen jade monkey for the Empress of China, the Panther enlists the help of martial arts master Ho Hum. 'Pantherella': The Panther reads the classic tale of Cinderella, but everything in the story's wrong!

programme.title: Count Duckula: Prime-Time Duck
programme.desc: Transylvanian Television arrive at the castle to feature it in a television programme.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Scott, T-Bob, and a shepherd, Mike, find the legendary gold of Brian Boru, but Scott is miffed when Mike later denies it.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Greenback makes a device to control DM's car.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Dino Sour Head': An inventive prehistoric Pink Panther must help rid his village of a pesky Tyrannosaur who is causing trouble. 'The Luck o' The Pinkish': While hunting for a four-leaf clover, Pink runs afoul of a mischievous Leprechaun.
programme.sub-title: Dino Sour Head/The Luck O' The Pinkish

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Stool Parrot': The Inspector and Panther must protect a witness to a fifty million diamond robbery...the Parrot. 'Pinky and Slusho': When the Panther's sno-cone business is threatened by Manly Man, the Panther creates Slusho, a talking snowman.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Colonel K teams Danger Mouse up with a robot Penfold, and Penfold with a robot Danger Mouse. The robots prove to be a lot of trouble for the real ones, taking instructions too literally or getting stuck running in circles.
programme.sub-title: Four Heads Are Better Than Two

programme.title: Count Duckula: The Lost City of Atlantis
programme.desc: Count Duckula and co. are stuck on a tiny island.

programme.title: Count Duckula: The Mysteries of the Wax Museum
programme.desc: Whilst visiting London, Duckula, Igor and Nanny bypass the famous Madame Tussauds in favour of visiting Dr. Matrix's Wax Museum.
programme.sub-title: The Mysteries of the Wax Museum

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: While vacationing in the canals of Venice, Danger Mouse and Penfold bump into a highway undergoing construction, being built by Baron Greenback, who holds a document that allows him to construct whatever he wants.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Whodunnit?
programme.desc: A letter arrives at Castle Duckula sent by lawyers in London.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: This is the original story that explains how racing came to be an integral part of the Mask-Venom relationship: Miles Mayem decided to allow his brother Max to join Venom.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventures
programme.desc: Bill and Ted get help from Henry Ford in repairing Detective Logan's classic car after they borrow it without permission. Along the way, they introduce an unusual Thanksgiving dinner to the Pilgrims and start the Wright Brothers on a new career.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventures
programme.desc: Bill and Ted accidentally damage the Mona Lisa and go back in time to have it replaced.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Sawdust Ring
programme.desc: Duckula, Igor and Nanny join the circus.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Danger Mouse must recover plans to a top secret device capable of shattering the world.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 1
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a property in Stockport, there's a Maidstone office with planning permission for six flats and finally a Telford house with some easy renovation opportunities

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 18
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a cottage in Devon, a converted terraced property in London and a house in Leeds.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 14
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a property in Preston, a property in Southsea and a terraced house near Durham with a surprise.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 21
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a confined ground floor flat in Wiltshire, a cottage in Kent and a plot of land in Yorkshire.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 3
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a grand farm house worth getting excited about in Cheshire, in Dorset there's an old wooden chapel praying for help from above and in Stoke there's a spacious semi with no space.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 7
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a three bedroom semi detached house in Nottingham, a Georgian terraced house in London and a workshop in Devon.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 28
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin visit a grand block of flats in Herne Bay with views of the sea. They also take a look at a bungalow in Derbyshire with enough space to build a second property and a Georgian property in Preston with four floors in need of a makeover.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 22
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a lovely property in Yorkshire, a great development plot in Kingston with an access problem, and a semi detached house in Cornwall.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander view properties in Wiltshire, Devon and Ramsgate.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 1
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a property in Wales, a top floor flat in London which could be a little ray of sunshine and a Ramsgate property that doesn't look all it's crack up to be.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 8
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a property in Plymouth, a house in London and a semi in Staffordshire.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 18
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a building plot in Warminster, a Victorian house in Selkirk and a top floor flat in Faversham.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view properties Gwent, West Sussex and Liverpool.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 11
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin see a vandalised property that needs a lot of work in Edgware. Instead of a property being auctioned; it's 29 acres of land attached to a beautiful farm in Somerset; and in Stoke-on-Trent there's a terrace with a fair bit of potential.

programme.title: Hitler The Last Ten Days
programme.desc: Alec Guinness plays Adolf Hitler in this chilling dramatization of the last days of the Third Reich. Trapped in the Berlin bunker with his mistress and high command, Hitler comes apart...

programme.title: The Hero
programme.desc: Richard Harris stars in – and co-directs – this powerful story of an aging soccer player whose life is crumbling. All he has left is a devoted 12-year old fan – and a desire to live free.

programme.title: The 39 Steps
programme.desc: A man in London tries to help a counter-espionage Agent. But when the Agent is killed, and the man stands accused, he must go on the run to save himself and stop a spy ring that is trying to steal top-secret information.

programme.title: A Star is Born
programme.desc: A young woman comes to Hollywood with dreams of stardom, but achieves them only with the help of a man whose best days are behind him.

programme.title: The Pink Panther 2
programme.desc: Inspector Jacques Clouseau teams up with a squad of international detectives just as bumbling as he is. Their mission: Stop a globe-trotting thief who specializes in stealing historical artifacts.

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood and Jeff Bridges lead a strong supporting cast in this offbeat crime caper about a colorful group of bank robbers determined to break into the fortress-like Montana Armored Depository.

programme.title: The Young Nurses
programme.desc: Kitty, Michelle and Joanne are lively young nurses who work at a large hospital and give the sexiest treatment you've ever seen in The Young Nurses.

programme.title: The Paganini Horror
programme.desc: From the minds of Luigi Cozzi & Daria Nicolodi, Paganini Horror is a slashtastic piece of cheesy Euro-horror that could only have been made in the 80s! An all-girl Rock group head to a remote villa, Little do they know, they have just unleashed hell!

programme.title: The Paganini Horror
programme.desc: From the minds of Luigi Cozzi & Daria Nicolodi, Paganini Horror is a slashtastic piece of cheesy Euro-horror that could only have been made in the 80s! An all-girl Rock group head to a remote villa, Little do they know, they have just unleashed hell!

programme.title: The Shape of Things to Come
programme.desc: Sometime in the future, man has set up colonies on the Moon, when Earth becomes uninhabitable. A madman decides to destroy the Moon colonies with his robots and automated ships, and only three people and their robot can stop him.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women are more often prey than predators, but the exceptions are deadly women indeed. In this episode, we’ll discover what drove these deadly women to prey on the unsuspecting.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Under His Control
programme.desc: These are love stories with bleak, bloody endings. Blinded by desire, obsessed and malleable, some women fall into lethal relationships with dangerous, controlling men.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A rifle in a shopping mall, a syringe of potassium chloride and a syringe of insulin, each in the hands of a mentally disturbed woman, lead to the tragic end of many lives.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Blood ties are strong ties, sometimes strong enough to pull a person into a murderous conspiracy. When a family member wields his or her power, the result can be death.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The heaviest judgments of convicted killers are reserved for those who committed premeditated murder. These women plot and plan. They know the consequences of their actions, but still they go forward to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Married to Murder
programme.desc: To the outside world, their marriages seemed happy. But behind closed doors, there was no domestic bliss. These women wanted out, but getting a divorce wasn’t their preferred option.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The mind of a female killer is shaped by a complex cocktail of influences. Do people become that way, driven by horrendous events in their lives? Or are some killers born bad?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Psychopathic killers lurk in society, mostly acting alone. Sometimes fate brings them into contact with another person who shares their cold power to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While their sisters chose a life of sensible, suburban motherhood, these deadly women chose a life of crime. They lived with the thrills, the danger and the deadly consequences of being outlaws.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A lovely lady with an innocent smile, kind eyes, a charming personality? No one would suspect a woman like that would murder. These women don’t look or behave like killers.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Greed
programme.desc: Known as “black widows,” these women kill their spouses, lovers and children for profit. Murder for them becomes a business. Their trade is murder. Their profit? Blood money.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Sacrifice Their Blood
programme.desc: To the outside world these caring mothers present a face of love - a suburban Mom, a caring community member, a housewife - but when the doors close, these deadly women will do whatever it takes to have their own needs met, even destroy their family.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Sins of the Sister
programme.desc: A sisterly bond can mean a life full of friendship and sibling love. But for some women, having a sister means nothing more then having their own personal meal ticket, scapegoat and combatant. These types of relationships can lead to deadly outcomes.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Killer Kids
programme.desc: For many parents, their children's teen years can be one big headache. But when typical teenage rebellion turns into deadly rage, a parent's love may not be enough to save their life.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The path towards revenge can sometimes lead to murder. It can be quick, fiery and violent. It can also be a dish served cold, the product of a calm, calculated plot.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Psychopathic killers lurk in society, mostly acting alone. Sometimes fate brings them into contact with another person who shares their cold power to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women never get their hands dirty: no blood touched them because they manipulate others to kill for them...but they didn't get away.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Nurse Beverley Allitt overdosed multiple infants, Stella Nickell poisoned medicine capsules in stores and Kathleen Follbigg killed four of her own children.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love to Death
programme.desc: Love and money are a beautiful marriage, for the lucky ones they create a life of happiness and ease. Unless the love is of money, the bride is a killer, and the groom their victim.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Crime Spree
programme.desc: They swept through six states like a plague, thrill killers acting without rhyme or reason. They targeted adults and young girls, kidnapping, and murdering. And in their rampage, they left plenty of clues, but moving targets are the hardest to hit.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The World Trade Center Bombing
programme.desc: Terrorist bombings are what happen in other countries. Not here in the United States. And yet, in 1993, it happened in New York City.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Human Prey
programme.desc: Thomas Dillon killed five outdoorsmen at random over a period of three years in rural southern Ohio. After a tip led the FBI to the murder weapon, ballistic testing made a match.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The C-11 Squad
programme.desc: New York City is not stranger to gang violence. But when a 12-year-old child was kidnapped, the gangs had crossed a line. Law enforcement raced to find the missing boy before it was too late.

programme.title: The FBI Files

programme.desc: Amanda and Jo invest in Reed's business, and Jake is hired as chief mechanic. Jo displays a lack of trust toward Reed after he leaves a suitcase of personal possessions in her care. Michael becomes addicted to painkillers.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Parting Glances
programme.desc: Jake and Amanda pull out of Reed's business when Jake discovers some inconsistencies in his story, but Jo accuses him of jealousy. Reed picks up a shipment of drugs on the boat while Jo is sleeping on board.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony will explore several regions of Colombia from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast to the coca leaf growing inlands formerly controlled by drug cartels.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: A country of only six million people where a vast percentage of the land is steaming hot jungle or a huge scrub desert known simply as The Chaco. This is one of the least known nations in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony explores what Burroughs called "Interzone," where artists sought escape from Western moral prohibitions and the possibilities of great empty spaces. But what is it like now?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: The Bronx is burning, became the defining image of New York City in the 70s. Politicians used it as a backdrop illustrate the dire situation in America’s cities while local officials let it burn

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony travels back to his homeland, his roots, his favorite state in the union: New Jersey. Part nostalgia, part cautionary tale. Tony makes sure to hit up some NJ classics.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, explore the far reaches of indigenous Andes in search of a rare variety of wild cocoa that is said to be the "best" in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Once Johannesburg was the most dangerous city in the world, but the end of the apartheid has lead to vast changes in the city. Tony visits the Johannesburg suburb of Hillbrow, and discovers the culture and, of course food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: New Mexico has the largest Hispanic population per capita in the US. No better way to see the mash-up of cultures that make up this uniquely American State, than by what the people here are eating

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony explores the other Hawaii, the one that those eight million tourists don’t see when they come to the islands. He discovers the fabric of a true cultural mixing pot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: This unique episode looks closely at the “other” Massachusetts far away from the blue blood getaways of Nantucket or the urban sprawl of Boston that most people know so little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: With the slight relaxation of control by the government of Myanmar, Tony is finally able to explore one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Few countries have a more contentious relationship with the United States than Iran. In this episode we heads to this Shia Muslim nation to explore a country few Americans have visited since the 80s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown: Salvador, Brazil
programme.desc: Tony heads back to his much-beloved Salvador, Brazil. The ever-present street festivals and the famous Carnival parade begin with sitting down with a local artist in the streets of the historic Pelo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony travels to Mexico City and Oaxaca to meet who fight for the food, the art, and the lives they believe in. In the Santa Anita neighbourhood of Mexico City, Tony meets boxer Jorge Lacierva.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony accompanies world-renowned chef and restaurateur Daniel Boulud as they travel back to Daniel’s hometown of Lyon, France for a pilgrimage of the city’s rich food culture and its legendary chefs.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony travels back to his homeland, his roots, his favorite state in the union: New Jersey. Part nostalgia, part cautionary tale. Tony makes sure to hit up some NJ classics.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony will explore several regions of Colombia from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast to the coca leaf growing inlands formerly controlled by drug cartels.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony explores what Burroughs called "Interzone," where artists sought escape from Western moral prohibitions and the possibilities of great empty spaces. But what is it like now?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: This unique episode looks closely at the “other” Massachusetts far away from the blue blood getaways of Nantucket or the urban sprawl of Boston that most people know so little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: The two funniest and most brilliant chef/restaurateurs in Canada, Joe Beef's Dave McMillan and Fred Morin, take Tony across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown: Thailand
programme.desc: Tony teams up with Chef and Author Andy Ricker of Pok Pok Restaurant fame. He's made a name for himself faithfully reproducing the cuisine of Northern Thailand at his restaurants in Portland and NYC.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trial Of The Century
programme.desc: Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Toxic Death
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lethal Encounter
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques to trace a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Forsaken Trust
programme.desc: When victims of murder know their killers, they are often caught off guard. But even the best-laid plans leave traces of the forsaken trust.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Grave Secrets
programme.desc: Killers often attempt to deflect attention away from their crimes by hiding the remains of their victims. Bodies may lay hidden for years before they are discovered.

programme.title: The New Detectives: At Close Range
programme.desc: When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Hidden Obsessions
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Raw Greed
programme.desc: A friendly Midwest lodge becomes the scene of a gruesome double murder. Two men are dead and a safe filled with cash is missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Target
programme.desc: Ballistics: A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head; the weapon lies next to the victim. It looks like suicide, but could it be murder? It's a question best solved by ballistics experts.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fateful Twist
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Aim
programme.desc: Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own fingerprint, allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Crimes Of Passion
programme.desc: When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Price of Murder
programme.desc: Using science as their most powerful weapon, investigators must find these hired killers and make them pay the true price of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Broken Trust
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Missing
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Error
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives: The Unforgotten
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.desc: The chefs must create a dish using potatoes as the key component. The pressure becomes unbearable for one chef, leading to a chaotic dinner service.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: In Too Deep
programme.desc: In 1999, Kiwi engineer Aaron Hopa and his English colleague Robert Glazzard were murdered on board a survey ship in the Persian Gulf in.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Fallen Angel
programme.desc: In this episode of Sensing Murder we learn about the murder of Angela Blackmoore, a 21 year old woman with a 2 year old child. The child was not harmed and the killer has not been found.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: Jim Donnelly was a hard-working family man living a quiet life in suburban Auckland. For 20 years he’d worked as a scientist at the Glenbrook Steel Mill, south of Auckland. On the 21st of June 2004, he simply vanished into thin air.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: Our new team of “ Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to unmask the killer – or killers – of vivacious New Zealand hairdresser Paula Brown who was plucked from Sydney’s downtown after a night out with friends.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Stone Cold
programme.desc: In 2004, Brendan Percy was found dead of hypothermia and dehydration in a sub alpine area above Oamaru in suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: A Bump in the Night
programme.desc: In 1980, six-year-old Alicia O'Reilly was raped and murdered in her bed, while her sister slept less than a metre away, and her mother sleeping across the hallway.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of Aces
programme.desc: Garth Doull trained to be a policeman but the lure of the race track saw him swap sides of the law to become a consummate con-man. On the 8th of September 1989, his body was found floating in Wellington harbour.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost Soul
programme.desc: In 1985, 25-year-old Luana 'La Verne' Williams disappeared from her Tauranga home. Eight years later her disappearance was upgraged to a murder enquiry. Her body has never been found.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Walk of Innocence
programme.desc: In 1970, eighteen-year-old Olive Waiker disappeared as she walked across Rotorua to babysit her nieces and nephews. Her semi-naked body was found hours later in a rest area south of the city..

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Now You See Me
programme.desc: 26-year-old deaf woman Alexa Cullen vanished from her home in Manaia, on the Coromandel Peninsular in 1995. She had a history of hitch-hiking and police suspected she’d run away. But three years later, ominous rumors began circulating in the community.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Sensing Murder Insights - Special
programme.desc: Police detectives from around New Zealand reveal exciting new developments sparked by the Sensing Murder psychics in Series 1.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Girl in The Ditch
programme.desc: When 12 year old Agnes Ali'iva'a drowned in a ditch in 1992, the police initially thought her death was accidental. It was four years before public and political pressure forced police to re-investigate her death.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: “Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to connect with the spirit of murdered Christchurch scrap-metal dealer, John Reynolds, to discover his killer and reveal the truth surrounding the violent attack.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Seeking Siegfried
programme.desc: Katikati man Siegfried Newman disappeared on February 25, 2008, after he had dropped his sons Thomas, 9, and Oliver, 7, at Pahoia School. Police carried out a three-day search but found no sign of him.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Where's Grandad?
programme.desc: 65-year-old Alan Gordon Woodford of Bedford St. Mossburn left his home on foot Saturday morning April 20, 1985 and was never seen or heard of again.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: 19-year-old Joan Wech left New Zealand for the bright lights of Sydney. But the first step on her overseas adventure would be her last. Was this a robbery gone wrong, a savage random attack or a revenge killing by a jealous ex-lover?

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Kid for Ransom / Tears for Daniel
programme.desc: We examine two notorious abduction cases. The first case is the Graeme Thorne ransom kidnapping at Bondi in 1960. Thorne, aged eight, was the son of winners of the Sydney Opera House Lottery.
programme.sub-title: Kid for Ransom / Tears for Daniel

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Body in the Sports Bag
programme.desc: A young Sydney man was found guilty of strangling his ex-girlfriend and stuffing the teenager's body in a cricket bag.
programme.sub-title: The Body in the Sports Bag

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Hunt for a Killer: The Claremont Murders
programme.desc: This chilling CIA episode details the long and difficult investigation which began with the disappearance of 18-year-old secretary Sarah Spiers from a night club in the up-market Perth suburb of Claremont on Australia Day 1996.
programme.sub-title: Hunt for a Killer: The Claremont Murders

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Anita Cobby Murder
programme.desc: In February 1986, nurse Anita Cobby, a former entrant in the Miss Australia quest, is walking home from Blacktown station in Sydney's outer-western suburbs. A Holden sedan pulls up and Anita is dragged into the vehicle.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: A Killer Amongst Us: The Norfolk Island Murder
programme.desc: On Easter Sunday 2002, on sleepy Norfolk Island in the south west Pacific, the body of 29-year-old Janelle Patton was found lying in an open field.
programme.sub-title: A Killer Amongst Us: The Norfolk Island Murder

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Gonzales Family Murders
programme.desc: On July 10, 2001, Sef Gonzales murdered his sister Clodine, 18, mother Mary Loiva Josephine, 43, and his father Teddy, 46, in their North Ryde home.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Snowtown: Bodies in the Barrels
programme.desc: In 1999, eight bodies are found in six barrels filled with acid in a former bank vault in rural Snowtown, 50 kilometres north of Adelaide.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Butchered Boys
programme.desc: This episode revisits Adelaide's notorious Adelaide Family Murders case, where six young Adelaide men were murdered during the 1970s and '80s. The victims were found in random locations throughout the state, their bodies neatly cut into pieces.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Cop Killer: The Winchester Assassination
programme.desc: The highest ranking police officer in Australia to be murdered, Assistant Federal Police Commissioner Colin Winchester was shot twice in the head at point blank range as he was getting out of his car outside his Deakin home on 10 January 1989.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Devil Inside: John Ernest Cribb
programme.desc: A chilling investigation of John Ernest Cribb, who on August 11, 1978 broke into the home of the Connell's. On a winter’s afternoon, Valda Connell and her four-year-old son Damien arrived home after having collected ten-year-old Sally from school.
programme.sub-title: The Devil Inside: John Ernest Cribb

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Michael Kanaan: Shoot to Kill
programme.desc: Michael Kanaan was an angry young man in a hurry to make a name for himself in Sydney’s underworld. But his volatile temper and penchant for violence soon led him to kill three men before he was finally captured in a wild shootout with Sydney police.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Greenough Family Massacre
programme.desc: The small hamlet of Greenough, near Geraldton in Western Australia, some 400 kilometres north of Perth, will forever be associated with one the most horrific murders in Australian criminal history.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Mystery of the Homestead Murders
programme.desc: The quick mind of a country telephone exchange supervisor led to a horrific discovery at a NSW country homestead in 1978.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Predator: Leonard John Fraser
programme.desc: Serial killer Leonard Fraser was suspected of killing at least five women over a 17 year period but took the complete truth about his life of crime to his grave.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Night of Terror: The Bega Schoolgirls
programme.desc: On the 6th October 1997, 14-year-old Lauren Barry and 16-year-old Nicole Collins disappeared while walking along a road near their home town of Bega, on the New South Wales south coast.
programme.sub-title: Night of Terror: The Bega Schoolgirls

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Murder of Innocence: Sian Kingi
programme.desc: On 27 November 1987, 12-year-old Noosa school girl Sian Kingi was grabbed off her push bike by Valmae Fay Beck and Barrie John Watts as she rode home from school.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Betsy Ross House

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Star Island

programme.desc: TAPS is the first team to investigate The Mount in Lenox, MA, the astounding estate of famous author Edith Wharton.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Club Dead
