programme.desc: In a protest against unsafe equipment, the cabbies go on strike, and Louie offers an unusual solution to the problem to shop steward Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a hilarious caper, Louie and the cabbies pool all their cash to buy a painting at an auction, planning to cash in big when the artist dies—but when the bidding gets too heavy, the gang turns a dignified auction into a frolicking free-for-all.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie, the dispatcher, becomes a lovesick pup after his girlfriend finds another guy. He will stop at nothing to get her back, including recruiting Alex for his hilarious scheme—and the riotous shenanigans at the Sunshine Cab Co. never stop.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a riotous family reunion when Jim returns home to face his millionaire dad for the first time since he dropped out of society in the ‘60s, and Alex has his hands full with Jim’s voluptuous, overly amorous sister,

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The Taxi gang falls prey to hilarious fear for homeless Elaine’s romantic well-being when chivalrous Bobby allows her to live in his apartment while he is gone. Unexpectedly, he returns before she has found other quarters

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Hilarious sparks fly when Tony tries to fix up his divorced sister with Alex. Instead, she ends up falling for Reverend Jim and Tony goes outrageously overboard trying to break up the affair.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie the dispatcher has the dubious honor of being selected by his employer’s revenge-seeking wife to be her clandestine lover, and comedic panic grips the love lair when the boss shows up unexpectedly.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Wild and crazy theatrics erupt when Tony decides to become an actor and Bobby, as his skeptical agent, is aghast when Tony lands a role because he is the right type.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s vicious letter to a hated critic is salvaged from the wastebasket and sent to the newspaper by a gleeful Louie, setting the stage for a wild and comical night when the critic, and the cabbies, decide to take in Bobby’s one-man play.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Latka Gravas is rejected by a young beauty, he sets out on an uproarious crash course to learn to be a swinging American Bachelor, a turnabout that works fantastically with the girls but turns off all of his friends at the garage.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Jim turns into a soothsayer when he warns of a bizarre catastrophe to befall Alex that also involves an affair with a beautiful blonde.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang hits the bricks in a hilarious hunt for new jobs when the Sunshine Cab. Co. goes out of business, with the promise that they will meet at Mario’s in one month to review their experiences.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies discover that life on the outside is not so rosy when the Sunshine Cab Co. shuts down. They all end up hilariously assuming new careers.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie turns into a jealous romantic when his overtures to accompany Elaine on her European vacation are rejected. Instead, Alex becomes the pretty cabbie's holiday companion on a tour of Europe's hot spots—culminating in a romantic rendezvous.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels must intercede when a troubled teen goes on trial for violent behavior as a result of his obsession with a video game.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels reunite with an old friend on the eve of her wedding to an agnostic man and try to stop her from making a mistake she will regret.
programme.sub-title: At The End Of The Aisle

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The angel Monica is excited at being promoted to the job of caseworker, a notch up from search and rescue missions, which finally gives her the chance to be seen by humans.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica takes a job as an assistant to a bitter high school baseball coach to help him come to terms with his impending death
programme.sub-title: Show Me The Way To Go Home

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica is assigned to work with a woman who is considering suicide because a blackmailer threatens to reveal her past

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: A pregnant teen must decide what to do.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: An accident occurs involving two women, Megan and Susana, who are dating the same man. The angels create a house on a deserted road, where the two friends, and Susana's husband, have Thanksgiving dinner.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The angels help with a social event for a well-known doctor, his wife, and his mother. A young child shows up at their home, claiming to be the child they agreed to sponsor. The wife welcomes the child, but the doctor and his mother are worried.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica and Tess take jobs as party coordinators in order to help an orphaned boy and a wealthy family discover what's been missing in all of their lives

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica’s own faith is tested when she is assigned to live on the street to help a man who’s lost his wife, his home, and his self-esteem in a special one-hour episode

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica assumes the role of a freelance reporter to help a father realize the pressure he's putting on his son
programme.sub-title: There But For The Grace Of God

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica and Tess encounter racial violence, a neighbor who turns away from any involvement, and an angel with higher power that theirs, when they volunteer to help at an AIDS hospice

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica steps in when a caustic female radio show host uses personal information about her daughter’s social life to boost her on-air ratings

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica reveals her true identity to convince a skeptical magazine editor, Callie Martin (guest star Dinah Manoff), that angels really exist

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica goes to work as a television producer to help a driven young reporter after she leaves the scene of a hit-and-run accident

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica puts on a police uniform to save a cop whose drug habit will soon destroy him

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica's job in a strip joint leads to work as the baby sitter to a child with a terrible facial deformity

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica and Tess sign up for a poetry workshop to help Clarice Mitchell (guest star Maya Angelou) come to grips with the love her son feels for a young woman who has been diagnosed with AIDS

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica is trapped with a bank owner and a pregnant teller inside a bank vault when a natural gas explosion thwarts a robbery in progress

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Mutant X comes to the aid of a teenager New Mutant pursued by Russians because she holds the secret to a new weapon that targets mutants.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Shalimar becomes close to another feral when it's "lust at first sight," but matters become complicated when her new boyfriend tries to find a cure for his condition.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Cat and Vincent are unsure if they can trust Alex with the truth about his past. Bridget Regan guest stars.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Evan receives an interesting proposition that could change the course of his cross species investigation.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Suspicious that cases involving the vigilante are being mishandled, a new Assistant District Attorney arrives at the precinct wanting answers.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: After taking their relationship to a new level, Cat and Vincent are forced to deal with reality when someone appears to be the framing the vigilante.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Cat is forced to reveal things that she had been keeping from Tess to salvage their relationship, and to protect Vincent.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Evan admits that he tipped off Muirfield to Vincent's whereabouts.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Gabe comes clean to Cat that he knows about Muirfield.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: On the anniversary of her mother's death, Cat asks Gabe to attend her family's annual remembrance of Vanessa.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Cat and Vincent go on a date out in public in an attempt to be a normal couple.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: Night of the Meek/But Can She Type?/The Star
programme.desc: Store Santa redefines Christmas for owner/Secretary finds alternate universe revering her job/Starship discovers Bethlehem's star and ancient civilization's remains.
programme.sub-title: Night of the Meek/But Can She Type?/The Star

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: Still Life/The Little People of Killany Woods/The Misfortune Cookie
programme.desc: Dan finds mystic photos in antique camera/Irishman's leprechaun tales turn real/Critic's end foretold by fortune cookies.
programme.sub-title: Still Life/The Little People of Killany Woods/The Misfortune Cookie

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: Monsters!/A Small Talent for War/A Matter of Minutes
programme.desc: Young monster fan meets alleged vampire neighbor/Alien threatens humanity, nations rush disarmament/Couple finds empty street with strange workers.
programme.sub-title: Monsters!/A Small Talent for War/A Matter of Minutes

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: Healer/Children's Zoo/Kentucky Rye
programme.desc: Jackie steals a healing stone but loses his way/A girl's zoo visit transforms her parents' relationship/Bob enters a strange bar post-accident.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: Welcome to Winfield
programme.desc: A grim reaper tracking a fleeing young man whose soul he is collecting follows the trail to a town seemingly from the Old West.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: The Leprechaun Artist/Dead Run
programme.desc: Vacationing in the United States, an Irish leprechaun is caught by three boys. To be freed, he must grant them three wishes/A truck driver accepts a job to deliver souls to Hell.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: Profile in Silver/Button, Button
programme.desc: A time traveling researcher attending the assassination of John F. Kennedy impulsively changes history/An unhappy couple is given an unusual offer. Push a button on a box and someone they don't know will die, but they will get $200,000.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: Need to Know/Red Snow
programme.desc: Edward investigates town madness, discovers individual secret/KGB agent uncovers Stalin's exiles alive, dead drained of blood in Siberia.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: Take My Life... Please!//Devil's Alphabet/The Library
programme.desc: A comedian killed by his rival finds himself in a strange stage show; something's off/In Victorian England, Cambridge grads are bound by an oath even in death/A woman starts at an odd library.
programme.sub-title: Take My Life... Please!//Devil's Alphabet/The Library

programme.title: Matlock: The Outcast (Part 2)
programme.desc: During his fishing trip, Matlock encounters the small, unfriendly town of Lone Pine as he attempts to solve the mysterious death of a young farmhand and uncover a town-wide coverup.

programme.title: Matlock: The Abduction
programme.desc: While attending a UCLA Law seminar, Matlock and Michelle end up in a dangerous dilemma. After giving Matlock inside information regarding an upcoming hit his former law school classmate is involved in a fatal hit and run.

programme.title: Matlock: Mr. Awesome
programme.desc: Matlock defends Anne Johnson, a single mother who’s been accused of murdering her recently estranged boyfriend.

programme.title: Matlock: The Evening News (Part 1)
programme.desc: A phony story is planted on the nightly news when a corrupt land developer pays off the on-air talent but when the producer fakes his own death, the anchorwoman unwittingly helps him along, never realizing it’s somebody else she killed.

programme.title: Matlock: The Evening News (Part 2)
programme.desc: Hired to defend an innocent newscaster, Matlock is baffled until evidence turns up that puts him on the trail of the real killer.

programme.title: Matlock: The Assassination (Part 1)
programme.desc: Matlock’s daughter’s surprise visit home is interrupted when a judge, on a Blue Ribbon panel investigating the assassination of the town Mayor, is accused of sexual assault and seeks Matlock’s counsel.

programme.title: Matlock: The Assassination (Part 2)
programme.desc: When his daughter is jailed for contempt Matlock takes over her case. Now it is up to him to uncover the truth behind a sinister cover-up that involves high government officials, including the Chief of Police, in a child pornography ring and a murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Vacation (Part 1)
programme.desc: When Matlock and his daughter Leanne arrive at a seaside resort to plan their new law partnership, they discover the manager has been murdered.

programme.title: Matlock: The Vacation (Part 2)
programme.desc: While vacationing with his daughter, Matlock tries to solve the murder of the hotel manager at their seaside resort.

programme.title: Matlock: The Ghost
programme.desc: A friend of Matlock’s, Mike Wilson, has been murdered and his wife has been accused of the crime.

programme.title: Matlock: The Singer
programme.desc: When a successful country music star is murdered, the promoter she fired – Steve Fisher – becomes the logical suspect.

programme.title: Matlock: The Juror
programme.desc: Matlock’s on jury duty, and the case against a man-about-town who stands to gain a fortune from his wife’s death seems airtight. Close examination of the evidence suggests otherwise to Ben.

programme.title: Matlock: The Fortune (Part 1)
programme.desc: When multi-millionaire Marvin Estes dies from an apparent suicide, leaving his fortune to supposed girlfriend Theresa LaValle, Matlock must find the missing beneficary.

programme.title: Matlock: The Fortune (Part 2)
programme.desc: When it’s discovered that a multimillionaire’s suicide is actually murder, Rick Stafford, the nephew recently cut out of his uncle’s will, is the #1 suspect. However, Matlock suspects other players in this high-stakes game of foul play

programme.title: Matlock: The Debt
programme.desc: Even though her former husband was a liar and a cheat, Leanne Matlock refuses to believe he was capable of murdering his philandering boss.

programme.title: Matlock: The Revenge
programme.desc: When testifying as a witness in a robbery case, Matlock is made to look like a fool. It soon becomes apparent that someone is playing tricks on him that threaten his credibility and safety.

programme.title: Matlock: The Obsession
programme.desc: Matlock is disturbed by frightening dreams that apparently give him clues to the murder of a doctor at a clinic patronized by celebrities. He even begins to wonder if he’s psychic.

programme.title: Matlock: The Divorce
programme.desc: It’s War of The Roses, Freudian style as divorcing psychiatrists forsake their couches for the courtroom. Matlock gets caught in the middle of a brutal battle that bruises more than egos.

programme.title: Matlock: The Final Affair (Part 1)
programme.desc: When Matlock looks into the double murder of a man studying for the ministry and the stabbing death of his wife, it looks like the case is closed when the wife’s lover is charged.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: RIA Flight 593 from Moscow to Hong Kong was routine in every respect. Then, in less than five minutes, it fell from the sky. There was distress call.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: 115 people on board a VIA passenger train on February 8, 1986, a pleasant trip would turn into a horrifying nightmare.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: On September 26, 2000, the Greek ferry “Express Samina” was sailing through the Aegean Sea, heading for the island of Paros.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: One of the largest train disasters in U.S history. A freight train rumbling through the suburb derails and crashes, destroying homes and taking lives.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: A hi-jacked Ethiopian Airlines 767 runs out of fuel near the Comoros Islands. From 31,000 feet the plane plunges toward the sea.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: August 2, 2005 - Flight 358 bursts into flames when it skids off the runway in Toronto during a raging thunderstorm. More than 300 passengers and crew have only seconds to escape the burning plane.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Smoke starts filling the cabin of a passenger jet. At the same time, the flight crew witness a shower of white sparks hitting their windshield. Within moments, the four engines of the 747 shut down.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: A mechanical problem at the back of an Air Canada DC-9 turns into an emergency 10. The pilot has to attempt an emergency landing. The plane goes up in flames 90 seconds after it hits the runway.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Korean Air Flight 801 crashes five km short of its destination. More than 200 people on board are killed. The crash is the beginning of a crusade for one passenger determined to make air travel safer.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Two 737 planes crash within several years of each other. The similarities are striking but investigators are stumped. It takes a third near miss, for investigators to get the break they need.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: February 19, 1985, a series of small mistakes causes a 747 passenger jet to fall 30,000 feet in just two minutes. Could a lack of sleep be behind the near disaster of China Airlines flight 006?

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Two planes collide in mid-air and crash into a Los Angeles suburb. There are more than 80 victims. The accident set in motion many changes, notably the way planes are monitored.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: A military 737 carrying high-powered passengers crashes miles from its intended destination in Croatia. Was the accident an act of terrorism against the United States or were other factors to blame?

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: A plane crashes into the Red Sea minutes after take off. Was it terrorism? A mechanical failure? Or did the very experienced and respected pilot make a mistake that cost all on board their lives?

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: A plane mysteriously circles the Athens airport. It doesn’t answer air traffic controllers. The captain and co-pilot are missing but someone else is in the cockpit.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: The crew of Delta Airlines Flight 191 see rain and lightning up ahead, but fly on. Inside the storm, their plane is hit by powerful winds that slam the plane to the ground. 136 people die.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: An inexplicable failure strikes – the loss of two engines on a brand new passenger jet. Powerless at 30,000 ft, the pilot needs all his skill, and a little bit of luck, to get his plane to the airport

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: We meet a couple from the Wirral as they take over a bed & breakfast in rural Spain. Two Brits from Milton Keynes race to open their new dive centre on the Med, and a pair of vineyard owners from Hereford open up a holiday complex in the Dordogne.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Can a couple of expats from the Northwest of England open their dive school in Spain? Two new Brit bed & breakfast owners struggle following a power cut in rural Spain, and we’re on a French vineyard run by a couple from Hereford.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A couple of bed & breakfast owners from the Wirral end up roughing it in Spain following a bumper booking. Two vineyard owners from Hereford try out their culinary skills, and a couple from Warrington move to Spain to open a cycle retreat.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Two British vineyard owners try to beat the French during a Boules tournament, a couple from Warrington struggle to find a Spanish villa for their business, and there are nautical nightmares for a Brit-run dive school.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Its harvest day for the Hereford couple running a French vineyard, a couple from the Northwest welcome a VIP to their new cycling retreat in Spain, and a couple of dive enthusiasts from Milton Keynes end their first season in Spain on a high.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A Norfolk couple move their soap-making business to southern Spain, the season kicks off for the British owners of a holiday complex in France, and bad news hit a Brit-owned adventure business in Mallorca as their bookings take a plunge.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A Brit confronts her staff at an adventure company in Mallorca, two rookie restaurateurs from Kent go into meltdown in France, and an English couple living in Almeria fears the effects of Brexit.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A holiday home business in France struggles with expensive maintenance costs. In Mallorca, a British-run adventure company deals with a very nervous cliff jumper, a couple of Brits in Spain spend two years’ worth of savings in eight weeks.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A spectacular new excursion brings big earnings to a British run adventure company in Mallorca, a couple of expat-wannabe-caterers in France struggle to feed the crowds, and a couple from Essex open a glamping site in France.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: At a glamping site in France, mouldy tents cause worries for the British owners. The owners of a Mallorcan adventure company make a massive investment, and there’s a godsend for two British restaurateurs in France.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A Norfolk couple moves to a picturesque French village to take over the only hotel, a Northumberland chef’s dream to open a restaurant in Mallorca, and two Belfast twenty-somethings gamble all their savings on buying a bar on the Costa del Sol.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A young couple from Belfast get more customers than they bargained for in Spain. The opening of a restaurant in France is in serious jeopardy, and renovations in a British-run restaurant in Mallorca prove more difficult than the owners ever thought.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: The Norfolk owners of a French hotel must call for reinforcements. In Mallorca, after a few exhausting weeks, a family from the Northeast finally opens their restaurant, and it’s crunch time for bar owners on the Costa del Sol when their chef quits.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A couple leaves Wales to try their luck running a bar in southern Spain, a couple of newlyweds swap Jersey for France, and two British hoteliers from Norfolk hand their livelihood over to their best friends as they take a well-deserved holiday.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: At a gite complex run by a Jersey couple, the first set of guests arrive. A couple from Wales struggle to keep afloat on the Costa del Sol, and a family from Northumberland expand their restaurant dream with a brand-new winter business in Mallorca.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A chef and her husband swap Buckinghamshire for France to set up a fine dining gite, a British couple reap the fruits of their labour, and an expat diver on the Costa del Sol fails to open his new scuba school.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: In Spain, an expat-run family friendly villa complex opens the doors guests. The Buckinghamshire couple running a fine dining gite in France are caught short by early arrivals, and there’s uncertainty for a Brit-run scuba school.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A chef from Buckinghamshire needs more income, so he opens up a cookery school in France, the British owner of a Spanish dive school waits for important news about his Gibraltar licence, and a couple from Portsmouth begin their new lives in France.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A couple from Essex with a dream of running a Spanish bar. At a Brit-run cooking school in France, a knife skills course doesn’t end well, and can a Portsmouth couple open their new bed & breakfast before the season comes to an end?

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A couple from Buckinghamshire find out if their new French cooking school has hit the right notes, two Essex boys finally open their Spanish bar. And will boiler bother bring the dreams of two Brit bed & breakfast owners in France crashing down?

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: When the models must point out each others worst physical features, one girl's harsh comments stirs tension, and Twiggy and Jay Manuel teach the competitors how to turn their negative flaws into positive.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Gets A Boob Job

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Supermodel Iman surprises the girls when she stops by the house to share her beauty secrets, and TV personality/comedian Chris Spencer challenges the models skills on to be an effective spokesperson for a skin care product.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Loves Bubbles And Talks To Plants

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Tyra directs a surprise, no-frills photo shoot with the models, and during the weekly challenge after enduring grueling work out, the models must immediately outshine each other at a meeting with the top editors from ELLE girl magazine.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models visit Top Model Cycle 3 winner, Eva Pigford, on the set of an ELLEgirl magazine photo shoot where the beautiful models are made up for a challenge to look angry while posing in wild scenarios with the stars of MTV's series "Wild Boyz,."
programme.sub-title: The Girl Whose Boyfriend Is Cheating On Her

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Emotions explode when one model is confronted about constantly talking behind her competitors' backs, and "Entertainment Tonight" correspondent Kevin Frazier teaches the girls about the importance of never letting their guard down in public.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Talks Behind Everyone's Back

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Challenged by J. Alexander to pose like statues in a park, the models find the task to be a little too realistic as they're swarmed by pigeons, and one competitor suspects another of stealing.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: After Barney's New York Creative Director Simon Doonan and Twiggy teach the girls about the different British fashion trends, the competitors are sent to impress top London designers by dressing in each trend.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Takes A Pill

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: With only three models remaining, the girls are first challenged to shoot a CoverGirl commercial and a national print ad, and after one competitor is eliminated, legendary photographer Gilles Bensimon shoots each of the final two girls.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve stows away aboard a plane carrying an illegal atomic bomb to a small nation; guests Carol Lawrence, George Gaynes.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve must use all his powers to subdue the male of a cryogenically frozen couple.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Assassins attempt to stop Steve from delivering an ailing prime minister scheduled for the first bionic-heart implant.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve winds up trapped in a mine when he tries to prove Oscar is innocent of gold-smuggling; guest Farley Granger.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve is determined to fly a new version of the experimental plane that caused his near-fatal crash; guest Clifton James.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: A hostile Caribbean country seizes Steve's research vessel and leaves him trapped in a diving bell on the ocean floor.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: A woman rescues amnesiac Steve after a plane crash in the mountains, then asks him to save her from hostile neighbors.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: A story by a TV reporter (Farrah Fawcett-Majors) makes Steve the target of international kidnappers; guest Hari Rhodes.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: A robot duplicate of Oscar Goldman attempts to destroy Steve while trying to obtain a formula for a new energy source.

programme.title: Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Seeking a magazine's $1 million reward, a mercenary lures Banner to an isolated laboratory.
programme.sub-title: Bring Me the Head of the Hulk

programme.title: Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Banner contracts for a cross-country trip in a car loaded with mob loot.

programme.title: Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: A muscleman (Lou Ferrigno) dreams of winning enough money to open a beach cafe.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Banner helps a young woman whose father left her a wax museum, now run by her unscrupulous uncle.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Seeking gold hidden in Banner's apartment, a gang awards him a Chinese mail-order bride; guest William Windom.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Banner investigates legends of another scientist, dead 30 years, who underwent a Hulk-type metamorphosis.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: David must decide between ending his own torment with the rediscovered antidote or ridding the world of the Hulk's dangerous predecessor.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: A wrestler's exaggerated boasts get Banner in trouble with the mob.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Banner tries to protect a mother and child from a family of outlaws; guest Don Stroud.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: A factory owner in debt to the mob labels Banner as his partner.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Banner and a baseball writer try to save a pitching prodigy's career.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Three escaped prisoners, one of them pregnant, take Banner hostage; guests Penny Peyser, Kathleen Nolan.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Banner must go to the police to save a former Vietnam hero from a sniper.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: A lumber baron and Banner vie for woman's (Andrea Marcovicci) affections.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Banner seeks an antidote for a bacteria contaminating a deserted town; guest Nancy Grahn.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, a down-and-out boxer (Martin Kove) rescues Banner from muggers.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Banner sees an heiress's stepmother administer a drug to her; guests William Daniels, Gerald McRaney.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, a down-and-out boxer (Martin Kove) rescues Banner from muggers.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Treasure Island
programme.desc: Sydney's on the hunt for a Pirate's booty, but will a traitor force her to walk the plank?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Women Want to Know
programme.desc: Sydney has found a temple with an idol of Ganesha and it is being filmed for TV, but they get trapped inside when the local rebels stumble onto them. Can Nigel and Karen help from USA?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Star of Nadir
programme.desc: An anonymous Sultan's wife Danielle dies in mysterious circumstances in the desert. However, she had called for Sydney to help. Sydney believes Danielle was searching for the Star of Nadir.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Devil Doll
programme.desc: A guide leads Sydney and Nigel to an unusual, underground Aztec burial chamber. Instead of a body, they find a relic.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Incognito
programme.desc: Retrieving a mythical lancet, Sydney and Nigel run into Nigel's look-alike just before his death. Nigel gets a cut from the lancet. Later, Cate persuades Nigel to impersonate the man.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: All Choked Up
programme.desc: Carson Inez, a collector, uses an ancient necklace to get Sydney to help her in raising Athena who will then help her conquer the world.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Warlock of Nu Theta Phi
programme.desc: When Sydney's student Meg's roommate finds a witch's amulet, it hospitalizes Meg. Meg's boyfriend's fraternity brother races to get the amulet. What is he up to?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Fire in the Sky
programme.desc: While Sydney is lecturing about the Native Americans who faced a mysterious cataclysm 600 years earlier, a native brings her a relic from that era. What is its secret?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Hunting with the Enemy
programme.desc: An urn commissioned in a Cambodian monastery by the Chinese emperor for the remains of Confucius is about to be destroyed by systematic bombing of a whole province.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Under the Ice
programme.desc: Despite terrible weather, Sidney drags Nigel along to an Arctic base where an ancient Indian mummy has been found, who turns out to be an Anasazi.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Antianeirai
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel travel to Istanbul to investigate the death of one Sydney's friends, a professor who was trying to prove Hercules did exist by finding the Belt of Hippolyte.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Faux Fox
programme.desc: When Nigel is charmed by brilliant student Lorraine to show her their offices (and kiss), a burglar knocks out Sidney, but what was robbed?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Pandora's Box
programme.desc: Sidney inherits from the best relic hunter of the previous generation a key and rushes with Nigel on the hunt for the one treasure he never found: Pandora's box.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Warlord
programme.desc: Bekkastan, 1401 AD: warrior princess Kahina proves her right to rule. 2002: Sydney and Nigel unearth a cave painting that might lead them to Kahina's Saddle. But her descendants cause complications.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Fountain of Youth
programme.desc: While Nigel rehearses his keynote speech in a Seville hotel room, a girl nearly breaks his nose demanding something - it turns out she was after the water from the Fountain of Youth.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Arthur's Cross
programme.desc: Scotland Yard calls Sidney and Nigel to identify a 5th century murder weapon. It turns out to be the burial cross of King Arthur, but besides the victim several others are looking for it.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: So Shall It Be
programme.desc: When Sidney and Nigel are about to enter the site of a Bristol lecture, a young author approaches them to follow up immediately on a tip about a map to the lost keys to the druid cult in Stonehenge.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Buddha's Bowl
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Nepal to recover Buddha's fabled overflowing alms bowl for villagers who are building a shrine to the original Buddha.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Headless Nun
programme.desc: When Sydney's plane crashes, she's asked by a group of nuns to find the head of another nun who was decapitated several centuries ago.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Part 2 sees Gregg venture ever deeper into the depths of Dorchester Prison and finds himself lost.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Karl enters the very haunted cottage at Eden Camp alone, and it doesn’t disappoint.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: The buildings that once housed POW’s from WWII are now inhabited by many a ghostly apparition, Stuart enters the chapel in search of whatever haunts there.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: HMP Shrewsbury is one of Britain’s Most Haunted prisons. Karl takes on C-Wing and the execution chamber in search of the spirits that lurk in the shadows of this formidable place.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Yvette and Mary investigate the abandoned top floor of the very haunted Croxteth Hall, and all hell breaks loose as something seems to be determined to stop the investigation.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Part 2 sees Karl investigated the first floor of this amazing location and it soon becomes clear that something is there with him.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Lost footage from Most Haunted’s shoot at Lancaster Grand Theatre resurfaces. In Part 1, a team member investigates the haunted dressing rooms alone—with eerie results.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Part two of the lost footage of the Lancaster Grand Theatre sees the team conducting a séance in the main auditorium where a ghostly figure makes an appearance.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: In unseen footage from Clifton Hall, Most Haunted’s Gregg explores the attic alone after a chilling walk-through—hoping to uncover what hides in the shadows.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: The team splits up in one of Britain’s most haunted prisons. In Part 1, Yvette, Mary, and Gregg enter the chilling A-Wing to investigate its many reported hauntings.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Part 2 of HMP Shrewsbury sees Karl, Glen, and Stuart explore C-Wing and the execution chamber, seeking answers to decades of terrifying paranormal reports.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Gregg enters the beautiful Townley Hall to look for some of the many spirits that are said to roam its dark corridors.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: At Glemham Hall, Karl and Stuart explore for the first time. In Part 1, Karl investigates the deserted servants' quarters, where toys appear to move on their own.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: In Part 2 of our investigation into Glemham Hall, Stuart walks the first floor rooms where something seems to be following him.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: In Part 3 at Glemham Hall, Karl explores the first-floor bedrooms, where a mischievous spirit quickly makes its presence known.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: While Karl walks the first floor, Stuart enters the old servant’s quarters and realises he is not alone for long.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: As Karl enters, what seems to be the prison mortuary, he quickly finds out that something is trying to get his attention.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Stuart enters a previously unexplored area of the prison and it seems that he is not alone.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Filmed as a live show backup during COVID, this unseen vigil sees Karl, Gregg, and Stuart explore the eerie underbelly of a haunted location under strict safety guidelines.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Karl enters the haunted stable block and soon realises he is not alone.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Stuart walks the first floor of this old manor house to find what is said to haunt its corridors.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Glen explores Aberdeen’s haunted Tivoli Theatre, attempting to contact a stagehand ghost who died 80 years ago but has been seen there ever since.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: After Guillermo Del Toro’s social media post about paranormal activity at his hotel, Gregg went to investigate the strange happenings firsthand.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Karl enters a cottage so haunted its owners keep its location secret. Inside, the atmosphere shifts to fear as a dark force reveals its power.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Karl enters Guys Cliffe House’s old stable block alone and soon senses the powerful spiritual energy said to haunt its dark corners.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Stuart investigates the two Masonic lodges at this very haunted location in search of the spirits of the long dead.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Karl explores HMP Gloucester, one of the UK’s most haunted prisons. Alone in the largest block and execution cell, he soon encounters an unworldly presence.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Stuart enters Gloucester Prison’s Hospital Wing and quickly senses an unseen presence sharing the space with him.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: Gregg investigates C-Wing which was built on top of an earlier Georgian prison and gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen
programme.desc: After the team’s investigation at Belan Fort ended, Gregg stayed behind to explore the dark corridors alone — and captured something emerging from the shadows.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Ruthin Castle
programme.desc: Yvette & Karl investigate a jewel in the crown of Great Britain, Ruthin Castle. They take on the infamous room 222 and soon realise they are not alone.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Chillingham Castle
programme.desc: Karl & Stuart take on one of the Most Haunted rooms in this ancient castle. Whatever is there, seems desperate to make itself known.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Monkey steals Heaven’s peaches, gains immortality, and battles officials. All are cast to Earth: Monkey trapped under rocks, Pigsy and Sandy cursed. Buddha decrees a holy man must fetch scriptures from India to save the world.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Kuan-yin seeks a holy man for the scripture quest, choosing young priest Hsüan Tsang, now Tripitaka. With Monkey’s magic staff, his powers, and a talking horse, their journey from China to India begins.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Tripitaka and Monkey start their perilous quest. A village terrorized by Pigsy leads to battle, then they face Sandy the cannibal water monster. Sandstorms and tiger ghosts threaten—will Monkey save his master from doom?

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The pilgrims meet Golden Horn and Silver Horn. Pigsy is bewitched, Monkey is tested by an old woman, and Tripitaka and Sandy are captured. A Taoist magician turns the tide when Golden Horn loses his magic bottle.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The youthful King kidnaps Tripitaka, desperate to outshine his father, the King of Ox. Monkey’s powers fail, Pigsy and Sandy are distracted—who will save their master from the fiery-tempered King of Youth?

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Monkey kills disguised demons, but Tripitaka, thinking they were humans, banishes him. When the truth emerges, Tripitaka is endangered, regretting his mistrust of Monkey and disbelief in the demons’ existence.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The pilgrims find a village cursed with drought by a water monster who demands boy sacrifices. With Monkey’s cloud useless, brave Pigsy volunteers to give his life to save the people.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Monkey saves a widow, but Pigsy falls in love while she desires Tripitaka. Staying behind, Pigsy’s piggish ways surface. When Monkey returns, Tripitaka and Sandy are already in trouble with the Snake Demon.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Monkey hunts bandits for Lord Li, but discovers they’re not what they seem. Meanwhile, at an inn owned by a wicked dog-woman, Tripitaka faces a dangerous surprise.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Tripitaka dreams of a slain king whose throne was stolen by a Taoist imposter. With the prince’s help, the pilgrims set out to reveal the false king and restore the rightful ruler.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: A wall divides the lands of night and day. The Queen of Night feasts on blood, the King of Day enslaves all. Reuniting them is hard when Monkey and Pigsy are both distracted by women.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Codslow suffers under three immortal tyrants. The pilgrims aid a family against the rulers who draw power from pearls, paper, and wine. Pigsy nearly roasts before Monkey devises a plan to free the land.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Pigsy searches for a missing girl, finding she’s married to a slug monster. Disguised as the slug, he lives with vain Hai-Min—until she notices her husband isn’t so slimy after all.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In a volcanic land plagued by quakes, a catfish demon and a faceless shape-changer fight. A priest claims one pilgrim is the impostor. Distrust splits the group apart.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The pilgrims meet a man digging a mountain tunnel for 22 years. Tripitaka insists they help, but Monkey’s magic shortcut angers him. Banished Monkey leaves them vulnerable to grave danger.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The King of Unicorns seeks Monkey’s magic staff as a gift. Using a magic ring, he captures Tripitaka and weakens Monkey. Pigsy, tempted by Chun-Shou, must resist to save his master.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The Grey Gloves Devil kills villages with hypnotic eyes. While Pigsy lags, a woman mistakes Tripitaka for her lost son. Captured, Pigsy must escape before the Devil strikes again.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: A village is ravaged by locusts led by Demon Queen Grasshopper, chasing the magic Lake Lok-Nor. Can the pilgrims stop her swarms, or will she turn them all into pigs?

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Honored guests of a prime minister, the pilgrims face black magicians and bandits. Tripitaka falls ill with Tibetan Fever, while Pigsy hunts a vampire and uncovers a shocking truth.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Ross Kemp
programme.desc: A courageous man who's living proof you can reinvent yourself more times than a Love Island contestant. He went from pulling pints in the Queen Vic to pulling BAFTAs for documentaries…

programme.title: Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Lucy Bronze
programme.desc: Tonight’s guest has lived that journey. From a football-loving kid to one of the world’s finest players, she’s lifted major trophies, captained teams, and become a role model for millions. Lucy Bronze welcome on the Yellow Couch.
programme.sub-title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Lucy Bronze

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Charlotte Crosby
programme.desc: She first burst onto our screens on Geordie Shore—back when her biggest commitment was to Jägerbombs and fake tan. Since then she’s gone from wild nights in Newcastle towinning Celebrity Big Brother.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Patrice Evra
programme.desc: Today, we’ve got a guest who has lived several lives in one. On the pitch, he was a fierce left-back who collected trophies like kids collect Pokémon cards. Off the pitch, he’s become the man of Monday mornings.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Ben Whittaker
programme.desc: A guest who has a huge drive and work ethics and has overcome some hurdles that have possibly made him stronger. His entrances make Harry Styles look underdressed at Coachella.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Kaya Scodelario
programme.desc: She became a household name at just 14years old, when she burst onto our screens in the groundbreaking series Skins. Since then, she’s pursued her acting dreams all the way to Hollywood — and built quite an impressive career.

programme.sub-title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Lucy Bronze

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Charlotte Crosby
programme.desc: She first burst onto our screens on Geordie Shore—back when her biggest commitment was to Jägerbombs and fake tan. Since then she’s gone from wild nights in Newcastle towinning Celebrity Big Brother.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Patrice Evra
programme.desc: Today, we’ve got a guest who has lived several lives in one. On the pitch, he was a fierce left-back who collected trophies like kids collect Pokémon cards. Off the pitch, he’s become the man of Monday mornings.

programme.desc: A guest who has a huge drive and work ethics and has overcome some hurdles that have possibly made him stronger. His entrances make Harry Styles look underdressed at Coachella.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A criminal (Richard Jaeckel) locks a scientist (Jackie Cooper) into a time-bomb belt to force the release of three prisoners.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Alerted in advance, Ironside has Brown pose as the driver of a kidnap vehicle to discover the identity of the victim.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: In London, Ironside finds himself trying to solve a police killing without Scotland Yard authority or approval.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A sniper just misses the editor (Sandy Baron) of a pornographic magazine during a posh party; guests Barry Sullivan, Leslie Charleson.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Fran gets obscene phone calls while staying at an absent friend's apartment; guest Barry Livingston.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside believes there is a link between a rumored gangland summit and the finding of a boat containing a bullet hole.
programme.sub-title: The Ghost of the Dancing Doll

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Fran guards a longtime feminist (Myrna Loy) threatened by an assassin; guest Alan Napier.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside suspects he's protecting the wrong target when he tries to prevent an art robbery; guests Dan O'Herlihy, Skye Aubrey.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside is caught in the middle of a bank robbery organized by a newly released convict (Don Stroud); guest Whit Bissell.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside decides to teach a lesson to a professional gambler (Robert Webber) who cheats the unsuspecting.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A scandal magazine prints a desperate woman's (Dorothy Malone) stories about her many nights with Ironside; guest William Schallert.
programme.sub-title: Confessions: From a Lady of the Night

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside investigates the fatal shooting of the son of Fran's divorced friend (Mary Ure); guests Clu Gulager, Herb Edelman.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside has a chance encounter with an old flame (Dana Wynter) who plans steal a jade tiger the chief is guarding.
programme.sub-title: In the Forests of the Night

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A badly beaten attorney (James Olson) describes an unconscious man aboard a sinking boat.
programme.sub-title: Fragile Is the House of Cards

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A top-security scientist disappears and Ironside discovers an unexplained $50,000 in his bank account.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A couple (Sharon Gless, Russell Wiggins) disappears while throwing a "haunted house" party in an abandoned mansion.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside seeks the would-be killer of a withdrawn 10-year-old who witnessed a murder; guest David Wayne.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside pretends to quit the force and poses as a Skid Row derelict to trap a killer; guest Kim Darby.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Emilia visits Peterborough, where a young woman, Sally Ann McGrath, went missing in 1979, having last been seen in the city centre. It took nearly eight months for her body to be found, after police assumed she had simply run away.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: The quiet seaside town of Mablethorpe was an unlikely location for what appeared to be an organised hit on a couple in their 50s. Emilia travels to the Lincolnshire coast to learn about the violent murders of Joan and John Stirland in 2004.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Jordan Monaghan comes under suspicion when his girlfriend is found dead. After all, he is already linked to two other suspicious deaths. Is he a serial killer?

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Emilia uncovers details surrounding the brutal murder of Rosie Darbyshire. Witnesses and CCTV were key to solving the case which shocked the local communit

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Chatham: Emilia uncovers details surrounding Joshua Stimpson's murder of ex-girlfriend Molly McLaren, a case which shook the victim's family and community to its core

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Emilia examines three murders which shook Beenham in the 1960s. One of the murders went unsolved for 40 years, until detectives vowed to finally seek justice.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Emilia looks into the killing of Martin Decker, who had been bludgeoned with a hammer. Police would link the murder to a suspect dubbed the NR3 cat killer.

programme.title: Murdertown: Hull
programme.desc: When a young woman goes missing on Valentine’s Day, detectives turn to a pollen expert, who pieces together fragments of evidence to find her body.

programme.title: Murdertown: Dartford
programme.desc: In 1993, 16-year-old Claire Tiltman is found dying by the roadside. Her killer disappears into the night. More than 20 years later, Colin Ash Smith is finally brought to trial. Jurors hear of how he knew Claire, and even went to her funeral.

programme.title: Murdertown: Dundee
programme.desc: Aged 15, Robbie McIntosh walked into a fish and chip shop to announce that a woman had been killed on the iconic Law Hill. Police revealed the victim had been stabbed dozens of times. But they never imagined that the culprit was the teenager.

programme.title: Murdertown: Barnsley
programme.desc: In 2015, a 69-year-old man is found stabbed in his home. At the scene, forensics uncover a receipt from a nearby cashpoint. CCTV at the bank reveals a woman using the victim's card to withdraw cash. Who is she? And how does she relate to the murder?

programme.title: Murdertown: Pontypridd
programme.desc: In 2014, a woman goes missing after a night drinking in the local pubs. CCTV finds her walking home arm in arm with another drinker. He just happens to be a former butcher. Police soon realise he has put his trade to use by dismembering his victim.

programme.title: Murdertown: Tamworth
programme.desc: In 1994, a gang kill a woman who manages a building society and tie up her husband, before robbing the building society of large sums of cash. But despite making a tearful plea for help, the injured husband’s story doesn’t tally.

programme.title: Murdertown: Watford
programme.desc: In 2000, a young woman is stabbed to death while walking her dog in a picturesque park in the town. A suspect is seen running semi-naked across the M1 motorway. It takes detectives weeks to identify the killer as a local man called Leon Amos.

programme.title: Murdertown: Huddersfield
programme.desc: In 2014 a sex offender called Robert Hind goes missing from a bail hostel. Cops fear he’s absconded to commit crime. The town is scoured. But then the cops learn that the sex offender hasn’t absconded - he’s been murdered.

programme.title: Murdertown: Sunderland
programme.desc: Throughout the early '90s young boys would be found dead after sniffing glue and being trapped in derelict buildings which caught fire. Cops soon found they were actually being systematically murdered by a man called Steven Grieveson.

programme.title: Murdertown: Brighton
programme.desc: In 2015 a man visits a tarot card reader. Within an hour she’s dealt out the death card and he’s confessed to a murder. When cops arrive they discover he’s been living at home with his victim’s body for days.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Portsmouth: Ten-part true crime series with Katherine Kelly examining the UK's most shocking murders and the impact they've left on local communities. First up: Portsmouth.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Wrexham: Katherine Kelly explores how Jordan Davidson left an entire community in fear, when his series of increasingly violent crimes culminated in murder.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Middlesbrough: Katherine Kelly examines Middlesbrough murderer Reginald Wilson, described by criminal psychologists as one of the most dangerous men ever to be assessed.

programme.title: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: Peter Sellers and Elke Sommer star in this successful sequel to The Pink Panther in which Inspector Clouseau tries to prove a beautiful parlor maid is innocent of killing her chauffer lover.

programme.title: Return of the Pink Panther
programme.desc: The hilarious, accidentally brilliant Inspector Clouseau once again takes on his archenemy, the insane Dreyfus, as he plots to control the world.

programme.title: Pink Panther Strikes Again
programme.desc: Chief Inspector Dreyfus (Herbert Lom) is finally driven mad by Inspector Clouseau's (Peter Sellers) incompetence and commandeers a doomsday device along with a demand for Clouseau’s death. Are 26 hired assassins a match for Clouseau's dumb luck?

programme.title: Revenge of the Pink Panther
programme.desc: Peter Sellers’ comedic genius shines when the hapless Inspector Clouseau is presumed to be dead. However, the very much alive Inspector travels to Hong Kong to investigate a dangerous drug lord (Robert Webber). Dyan Cannon and Herbert Lom also star.

programme.title: Trail of the Pink Panther
programme.desc: This tribute to the late Peter Sellers contains unused scenes from the previous Pink Panther films interspersed with new footage and features a great comedic cast.

programme.title: Curse of the Pink Panther
programme.desc: Inspector Clouseau is missing and the Pink Panther (David Niven) is hot on his trail in this wildly funny laugh-fest that offers plenty of slapstick humor and a myriad of stars including Joanna Lumley, Herbert Lom and Robert Wagner.

programme.title: Son Of The Pink Panther
programme.desc: Blake Edwards directs this romantic high-adventure that has Inspector Clouseau's illegitimate (and alarmingly similar!) son (Roberto Benigni) botching a mission to rescue a kidnapped princess (Debrah Farentino).

programme.title: The Pink Panther
programme.desc: Comic icon Steve Martin steps into the shoes of the late Peter Sellers and wonderfully reprises the role of the bumbling, world famous Inspector Jacques Clouseau in this remake of Blake Edwards comedy classic, The Pink Panther.

programme.title: The Pink Panther 2
programme.desc: Inspector Jacques Clouseau teams up with a squad of international detectives just as bumbling as he is. Their mission: Stop a globe-trotting thief who specializes in stealing historical artifacts.

programme.title: The Pink Panther
programme.desc: In this riotously funny farce, Peter Sellers introduced the world to Jacques Clouseau, the clumsiest Inspector ever to trip over a case, who is out to stop the notorious Phantom (David Niven) from stealing the priceless Pink Panther diamond!

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Kelly Cochran
programme.desc: When Chris Regan started dating coworker Kelly Cochran, he knew she was married. But he had no idea of the wedding day pact she had made with husband Jason. Chris had become entangled in a love triangle that would see two people lose their lives.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Mahmuda Khatun
programme.desc: Amin Miah wanted a devout, homely wife to start a family with. Mahmuda Khatun wanted a career, a social life - and her family off her back. Their differences were irreconcilable, and one of them would choose the violent way out.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Thomas Infante
programme.desc: Lisa and Thomas Infante were childhood sweethearts who grew up on the same street. It seemed inevitable they would end up together. But their marriage was volatile, and when one of them found love elsewhere, the consequences would be fatal.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Malcolm Webster
programme.desc: The women in Malcolm Webster’s life seemed prone to bad luck. One died in a car crash. Another suffered a mysterious illness. A third, a keen sailor, found her life jacket punctured. How long before police realised this was more than coincidence?

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Stephen Searle
programme.desc: Stephen and Anne Searle were the grandparents at the helm of a large, close-knit family. But Stephen was having an affair, and Anne had been pushed to drink by her husband’s controlling behaviour. Neither was destined to enjoy a peaceful retirement.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Ann Marie Anastasi
programme.desc: Ann Marie and Anthony Anastasi had four children, a big house on a desirable street… and a younger lover living in their basement. It was a toxic love triangle, and one that was destined to end in tragedy.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Hannegret Donnelly
programme.desc: The Donnelly family’s neighbours knew they were unusual. Christopher and Hannegret were rarely seen outside the house, and the children were home-schooled. But no one could guess the violence taking place within their home - until it was too late.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Iain Lawrence
programme.desc: Ian and Sally Lawrence were a glamorous couple, and they looked like they had it all. But their marriage suffered when Ian’s star started to fall as Sally’s career rocketed. And when the couple suffered a terrible car crash, only one came out alive.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Chaz Higgs
programme.desc: High-profile politician Kathy Augustine married nurse Chaz Higgs after a whirlwind romance. They were an unlikely match, and when their marriage hit the rocks, Chaz decided to use his medical training to commit an undetectable crime.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Denise Williams
programme.desc: Denise Williams was devastated when her husband Mike disappeared on a hunting trip. He was feared drowned. But Mike’s mother Cheryl didn’t buy it, and after years of relentless campaigning, she finally uncovered the truth about her son’s death.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Paul Novak
programme.desc: Paul Novak was a thrill-seeking paramedic who loved the hustle and bustle of the city. His wife Catherine was a homemaker and volunteer who preferred small town life. Unable to reconcile their differences, Paul decided to plan the perfect crime.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Janbaz Tarin
programme.desc: Raneem Oudeh came to the UK from Syria to escape war, looking forward to a brighter future for herself and her son. Everything was falling into place until she met Janbaz Tarin, a man who saw no boundary between love, obsession, and extreme violence.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: George Worgan
programme.desc: Kelly and George Worgan looked like the perfect parents, playing happy families on Facebook with pictures of days out. But behind closed doors, they had financial struggles and rows. When their marriage ended in murder, no one saw it coming.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Tia Young
programme.desc: George Young worked his fingers to the bone to give his loved ones a better future: his wife, Tia, their three sons, even his friend Tim Lee. How was this generosity repaid? With deception, infidelity, and a plot to cash in on his death.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Chacey Poynter
programme.desc: Bob Poynter was old enough to be Chacey’s father. And he was married. But those were minor obstacles to her. However, when their romance hit the skids, Chacey enlisted yet another of her lovers to help bring the marriage to a brutal end.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: David Clark
programme.desc: Melanie and David Clark’s marriage was the definition of toxic. He was controlling and angry, and she had affairs. They seemed unable to tear themselves apart - until one violent incident ended their marriage for good.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Nat Fraser
programme.desc: Arlene McInnes and Nat Fraser had a whirlwind romance, marrying and having their first child within 18 months of meeting. But Nat soon revealed himself as a womanising, violent bully. When she rebelled against him, he hatched a plot to punish her.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Brian Burns
programme.desc: Brian and Carla Burns were both medics in their 40s when they met and fell in love. But married bliss didn’t last, and divorce proceedings were messy. Carla disappeared, and fingers pointed at Brian, but he was ready with a bizarre explanation.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Lois Riess
programme.desc: Lois and David Riess were grandparents and business owners. Lois was also a gambling addict who would do anything to feed her habit. David became the first victim of a murderous rampage that earned Lois the title of America’s most wanted grandmother.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Yosemite Park Murderer
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day weekend 1999, three tourists from Yosemite National Park disappeared and were found murdered a month later.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Silent Sniper
programme.desc: In March 1992 Claude Hawkins was shot dead while he was fishing in Ohio. Hawkins' murder mirrored multiple deaths in other nearby counties.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Doctor of Death
programme.desc: When emergency services arrived at the office of respected neurologist Richard Boggs following the report of a patient's death, they had their suspicions regarding the circumstances...

programme.title: Crime Stories: Terror by Text
programme.desc: On a wintry morning in Sweden, Alexandra Fossmo, wife of pastor Helge Fossmo, was found shot to death in her bed.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Arbitrary Assassins
programme.desc: In November 1996, Raymond Collin went missing in his hometown of Timmins, Ontario. The discovery of his body days later in a snow-covered truck led police to an assortment of possible suspects.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Slaying Sweethearts
programme.desc: When Erika DeNardo‚Äôs mother and brother were murdered, she told police and neighbours it had been the work of thieves.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Girls Just Wanna Get Found
programme.desc: Cindy Zarzycki is 13 years old when she goes missing on her way to a Detroit ice cream store.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Long Stemmed Killer
programme.desc: Just hours before her divorce hearing, Atlanta socialite Lita McClinton opens her front door for a flower delivery. The deliveryman hands her a box of roses and then shoots her dead.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Russians Are Killing
programme.desc: It is just another meeting for Los Angeles real estate developer Meyer Muscatel. Unfortunately Muscatel meets with a Russian immigrant with murderous intent.

programme.title: Crime Stories: A Way with Murder
programme.desc: Nancy, David and Susan Spangler are found shot to death in their home - the brutal slaughter is deemed a murder suicide.

programme.title: Someone They Knew
programme.desc: Successful Atlanta entrepreneur Lance Herndon usually got what he wanted.

programme.title: Someone They Knew
programme.desc: Who shot the new sheriff of Dekalb County? When Derwin Brown was gunned down shortly after winning his election, investigators thought it might have been a political assassination.

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 073
programme.desc: Murder of Aundria Crawford – College student Aundria was kidnapped, abused, and buried by parolee Rex Krebs. A parole agent spotted a pattern linking Krebs to the crime. DNA and evidence found at Krebs’ home led to his arrest. He’s now on death row.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 073

programme.desc: Karen Gets Upset No One Helps Her At A Store/Teen Sets off Fireworks on Toronto Bus

programme.desc: Murder of Beverly Carter – When real estate agent Beverly vanished during a showing, police raced against time. Texts from her phone led them down a dark, twisted path in their quest for justice.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 042

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 040
programme.desc: Murder of Shannon Rippy Van Newkirk – After Shannon missed her birthday, police found she’d been with co-worker James Bradley, a parolee for murdering his stepdaughter. Shannon’s body was never found, but Bradley was sentenced to 30-37 years.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 040

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 041
programme.desc: Murder of Shanti Cooper Tronnes – David called 911 saying he found Shanti dead, but fights over their house and her threats to leave led him to kill her for the house and life insurance money.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 041

programme.title: Judgment With Ashleigh Banfield: Judgment of The Jewish Center Killer
programme.desc: No one argued that Naveed Haq suffered from mental health issues when he walked into the Seattle Jewish Federation office and started shooting, wounding six women and killing one.
programme.sub-title: Judgment of The Jewish Center Killer

programme.title: Judgment With Ashleigh Banfield: Judgment of The Followers of Christ Part 1
programme.desc: When 15-month-old Ava Worthington became ill with a cold, her parents Carl and Raylene did what they always did – relied on the tenets of the Followers of Christ church.
programme.sub-title: Judgment of The Followers of Christ Part 1

programme.desc: A rock giant awakens in the old quarry, threatening to crush the town. // The trio attend a disappointing Space Camp run by a real astronaut, Sparky Nickerson.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Mona and Charley beam a message via satellite to extraterrestrials across the universe // Mona's attempts to ward off an imminent invasion by red moon monsters are stymied by the new next-door-neighbor

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Mr. Hyde restores an antique ice cream sign of a giant-sized Freddy Frosty that was found in the town dump Mona // Charley's sudden interest in being a musician lands him in a rock band
